title: Tommee Tippee Easiscoop Baby Feeding Bowls with Triangular Base and Ergonomic Handle, Stackable, Perfect for Weaning, 6 Months+, Pack of 4
features: Super soft: The Softee Weaning Spoons feature a soft tip which gently tips food into baby’s mouth and is gentle on gums
Unique triangular base: The unique triangular base makes it easy to scoop up every mouthful, meaning less waste and clearing up
Ergonomic handle: The ergonomically shaped, built-in handle on the side of the bowl means they’re easy to hold without getting your fingers messy
Stackable: When mealtime’s over, these weaning bowls stack inside each other, saving valuable storage space
Easy to clean: Wash with hot soapy water or pop them on the top shelf of your dishwasher. They are also microwave and steriliser-safe
BPA free: Our Easiscoop bowls are BPA, BPS, PVCS, phthalate and nitrosamine free
Feeding Bowls x 4 for extra value
Can be used with Magic Mat
Microwave, dishwasher (top shelf only) and freezer safe
BPA free and available in two different pack colour combinations (teal/lime and pink/orange)
description: From the brand Tommee Tippee After 60 years of supporting parents around the world, we’ve learned the truth is… everyone’s everyday is different. And that’s okay. ​ Previous page For us, it’s all about making life easier for real mums, dads and caregivers all over the world. ​ ​ At feed time, mealtime, change time and sleep time. We want to make things easier where we can, always listening, creating, and inventing for new parents. ​ ​ It’s no wonder our products are loved by little ones and recommended by generations of parents. ​ See more baby bottles Visit the store See more infant feeding​ Visit the store See more Soothers Visit the store See more Meal Time Visit the store See more sleep Visit the store See more breast-feeding Visit the store See more Change Time Visit the store See more sleeping bags Visit the store See more Care Visit the store Next page
